paper.title_en: Pole-skipping without master variable and holographic superfluids
paper.abstract_en: The pole-skipping is a universal property of Green's functions at strong coupling found by the AdS/CFT duality. There is a conventional formalism of the pole-skipping, but it relies on the existence of a "master variable." Namely, it is applicable to a system with a single field. We propose an alternative formalism that does not rely on a master variable. As an example, we study the pole-skipping of holographic superfluids. A "hydrodynamic" pole such as the diffusion pole is usually regarded as a pole-skipping point. But we point out that not all hydrodynamic poles are pole-skipping points.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文提出了一个不依赖主变量的极点跳跃新形式，并以全息超流体为例进行了分析，揭示了并非所有流体动力学极点都是极点跳跃点，具有理论创新性。
decision.title_zh: 无主变量下的极点跳跃与全息超流体
decision.abstract_zh: 极点跳跃是通过AdS/CFT对偶发现的强耦合下格林函数的普遍性质。存在一种传统的极点跳跃形式，但它依赖于“主变量”的存在。也就是说，它适用于具有单一场的系统。我们提出了一种不依赖于主变量的替代形式。作为例子，我们研究了全息超流体的极点跳跃。通常将“流体动力学”极点（如扩散极点）视为极点跳跃点。但我们指出，并非所有流体动力学极点都是极点跳跃点。
